reviews.review_description: The opportunity to immerse myself in the intricate details of the artworks was truly a unique experience. It allowed for a serene and personal exploration, creating a peaceful atmosphere that made me feel entirely absorbed in the art. It provided a wonderful way to unwind, appreciate the beauty of Simberg's creations, and lose myself in the world of art without any distractions. I highly recommend this virtual exhibition as a pleasant way to relax and indulge in the world of art. PS. Soundscape was amazing as well!

reviews.review_title: Excellent way to experience art online!
reviews.review_description: This was a really nice way to experience art online! I could see the artworks bigger than I would have in real life. The soundscape was excellently build. I was thrilled there was a voiceover explaining more about the artworks (audio available in Finnish and in English), so I could just listen and immerse myself to the art. There was a lot to see and learn in four different themed worlds, so I could see myself experiencing The World of Hugo Simberg more than just once.
